flows: start -> utente creato? — type=transition; label="utente creato?"; explanation="checks if user is created";
utente creato? -> home — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user not created";
utente creato? -> creazione utente — type=transition; label="yes"; explanation="user creation process";
creazione utente -> creazione corretta? — type=transition; explanation="checks if user creation is correct";
creazione corretta? -> home — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user creation successful";
creazione corretta? -> home — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user creation failed";
start -> utente creato?
if utente creato? is "yes", then home.
if utente creato? is "no", then creazione utente -> creazione corretta?
this diagram models the flow of a user access process.
the process starts by checking if a user is already created.
if a user is not created, the user creation process is initiated.
after the user creation process, the system checks if the user creation was successful.
if successful, the user is directed to the home page.
if not successful, the user is directed to the home page.
home -> accesso alla creazione — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="yes"
home -> accesso alla creazione -> creazione commissione — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="no"
home -> accesso alla creazione -> creazione offerta — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="no"
creazione commissione -> creazione corretta — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="yes"
creazione commissione -> creazione corretta -> no — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="no"
creazione offerta -> creazione corretta — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="yes"
creazione corretta -> si — type=fork; explanation="success"
home -> accesso alla creazione — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="is access to creation possible?"
accesso alla creazione -> creazione commissione — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="is creation a commission?"
creazione commissione -> creazione corretta — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="is creation correct?"
creazione commissione -> creazione corretta — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="is creation correct?"
creazione corretta -> no — type=fork; explanation="failure"
accesso alla creazione -> creazione offerta — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="is creation an offer?"
creazione offerta -> creazione corretta — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="is creation correct?"
creazione offerta -> creazione corretta — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="is creation correct?"
the diagram models a decision process for creating something, potentially a document or a project.
the process checks for access, whether it's a commission or an offer, and then verifies if the creation is correct.
there are two possible outcomes for each decision: success (creation is correct) or failure (creation is not correct).
home -> menu — type=initial node; label="home"; explanation="start of the process";
menu -> accesso ad ‘menu’? — type=decision; label="accesso ad ‘menu’?"; explanation="check if the user wants to access the menu";
menu -> informazioni profilo — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if yes, go to informazioni profilo";
menu -> guida — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if no, go to guida";
menu -> accesso ad ‘menu’? — type=decision; label="accesso a profilo?"; explanation="check if the user wants to access the profile";
informazioni profilo -> - none — type=final node; label="- none"; explanation="end of the process";
guida -> - none — type=final node; label="- none"; explanation="end of the process";
the diagram models a simple navigation flow within a system.
the user starts at the "home" node.
the system checks if the user wants to access the "menu".
if the user wants to access the menu, the system checks if the user wants to access their profile.
if the user wants to access their profile, the system displays profile information.
if the user does not want to access the menu or their profile, the system displays a guide.
both the "informazioni profilo" and "guida" activities lead to a final node, indicating the end of the process.
validations: utente creato? — branch="yes" (to home); branch="no" (to creazione utente)
creazione corretta? — branch="si" (to home); branch="no" (to home)
accesso a profilo? — type=decision; label="accesso a profilo?";
